hooks.command: pnpm run lint:fix > /dev/null 2>&1; OUTPUT=$(pnpm run lint 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUTPUT" >&2; exit 1; fi
OUTPUT=$(pnpm run check 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUTPUT" >&2; exit 1; fi

OUTPUT=$(pnpm run coverage 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -ne 0 ]; then echo "$OUTPUT" >&2; exit 1; fi; CLEAN=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | perl -pe 's/\e\[\d+(?:;\d+)*m//g'); if echo "$CLEAN" | awk -F'|' '/\|/ && !/^-/ && !/File/ && !/All files/ { gsub(/[[:space:]]/,"",$2); gsub(/[[:space:]]/,"",$4); gsub(/[[:space:]]/,"",$5); if(($2!="" && $2+0!=100) || ($4!="" && $4+0!=100) || ($5!="" && $5+0!=100)) { found=1 } } END { exit !found }'; then echo "Coverage is not 100%. Fix the uncovered lines:" >&2; echo "$CLEAN" | grep '|' >&2; exit 1; fi
